description_long: This is a cylindrical barrel with a smooth, slightly glossy surface and a pale pinkish-beige color. The barrel features vertical reddish-brown stripes evenly spaced around its circumference, giving it a segmented appearance. The top surface is flat and displays a prominent biohazard symbol in red, suggesting it is used for hazardous or medical waste. There are no visible handles, spouts, or openings other than the sealed lid on top. The construction appears to be of a sturdy, possibly plastic or composite material, suitable for containing dangerous substances. The overall design is utilitarian, with no decorative elements, emphasizing function and safety.
description: A cylindrical, pinkish-beige barrel with vertical reddish stripes and a biohazard symbol on the lid, made for hazardous waste containment.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat lid with a clear biohazard symbol and three vertical stripes.
description_view_1: Side view with the biohazard symbol partially visible and vertical stripes prominent.
description_view_2: Another side view with the biohazard symbol slightly more visible and vertical stripes aligned.
description_view_3: Rear view with the biohazard symbol barely visible and vertical stripes continuing around the body.
